Tax Deed Surplus Funds​

After a tax deed sale that results in surplus, the excess funds are held by the Clerk for payment to government agencies, lienholders, and former owners.  The Clerk determines who is entitled to these funds based on Claims submitted. If you feel you have a Claim to surplus funds, please view the information given in the Checklist below and submit the Claim Form and W-9 Form to the Clerk as soon as possible.  If you have any questions, please feel free to contact the Clerk at 850-838-3506 ext 103.

Please Note:  Individuals may make Claims personally and are not required to have representation to file a Claim.

Checklist for Claiming Surplus Funds
Tax Deed Surplus Claim Form
W-9 Form: Request for Taxpayer Identification Number & Certification

Submit Claim Forms to:

Taylor County Clerk of Court
PO Box 620
Perry, FL 32348
Attn:  Tax Deed Dept
